task: 实现 Web UI compact 分界线渲染 + 旧消息折叠 + 清空 tool_result 过滤

rounds.summary: Part 1: Settings panel compact button, progress bar indicator, SSE compact_boundary handling, /compact slash command, CSS animations

Part 2: parseSessionMessages system case for compact_boundary, addCompactBoundary() with old message folding, tool_result cleared content filter, compact boundary CSS styles, SSE handler updated to use addCompactBoundary
